codeSystems.name: VkpPerformerIdentifiersCodeSystem
codeSystems.title: Vkp Performer Identifier Systems CodeSystem
codeSystems.description: The CodeSystem contains all codes allowed for Observation.performer.system for use with VKP

codeSystems.name: VkpPerformerOrganizationIdentifiersCodeSystem
codeSystems.title: Vkp Performer Identifier for organizations CodeSystem
codeSystems.description: The CodeSystem contains all codes allowed for Observation.performer.system for use with VKP identifying organizations
codeSystems.ValueSet-vkp-performer-organization-iden: VKP Performer Identifier for organizations ValueSet

codeSystems.name: VkpSubjectIdentifiersCodeSystem
codeSystems.title: Vkp Subject Identifier Systems CodeSystem
codeSystems.description: The CodeSystem contains all codes allowed for Observation.subject.system, for use with VKP

codeSystems.name: BundleType
codeSystems.title: BundleType
codeSystems.description: Indicates the purpose of a bundle - how it is intended to be used.

codeSystems.name: HTTPVerb
codeSystems.title: HTTPVerb
codeSystems.description: HTTP verbs (in the HTTP command line). See [HTTP rfc](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231) for details.

codeSystems.name: IdentifierUse
codeSystems.title: IdentifierUse
codeSystems.description: Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

codeSystems.name: ObservationStatus
codeSystems.title: ObservationStatus
codeSystems.description: Codes providing the status of an observation.

codeSystems.name: QuantityComparator
codeSystems.title: QuantityComparator
codeSystems.description: How the Quantity should be understood and represented.

codeSystems.name: ResourceType
codeSystems.title: ResourceType
codeSystems.description: One of the resource types defined as part of this version of FHIR.
codeSystems.ValueSet-vkp-performer-reference-types.v: Vkp Performer reference types Systems ValueSet

codeSystems.name: SearchEntryMode
codeSystems.title: SearchEntryMode
codeSystems.description: Why an entry is in the result set - whether it's included as a match or because of an _include requirement, or to convey information or warning information about the search process.

codeSystems.name: SNOMED_CT
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT (all versions)
codeSystems.description: SNOMED CT is the most comprehensive and precise clinical health terminology product in the world, owned and distributed around the world by The International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO).
codeSystems.http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/valueset-referenc: Observation Reference Range Applies To Codes

codeSystems.name: DataAbsentReason
codeSystems.title: DataAbsentReason
codeSystems.description: Used to specify why the normally expected content of the data element is missing.

codeSystems.name: ObservationReferenceRangeMeaningCodes
codeSystems.title: Observation Reference Range Meaning Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the meaning/use of a reference range for a particular target population.

codeSystems.name: IdentifierType
codeSystems.title: identifierType
codeSystems.description: HL7-defined code system of concepts specifying type of identifier. Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging data types CX, PLN, PPN, XCN and XON.

codeSystems.name: ObservationInterpretation
codeSystems.title: ObservationInterpretation
codeSystems.description: One or more codes providing a rough qualitative interpretation of the observation, such as "normal" / "abnormal", "low" / "high", "better" / "worse", "resistant" / "susceptible", "expected" / "not expected". The value set is intended to be for ANY use where coded representation of an interpretation is needed.
